_comment: Generated by js-sdk/scripts/gen-predicate-fixtures.py from concordia.predicate / concordia.predicate_type_profiles / concordia.attestation. All canonical bytes, signatures, verify outcomes, and validation error lists are Python-produced; do not edit by hand.

errors: algorithm must be EdDSA or ES256

profile_cases.name: non_deterministic_with_result
expected_errors: deterministic-semantics gate violation: condition.result is only allowed for deterministic predicate type profiles

profile_cases.name: unregistered_type
expected_errors: predicate type profile must be registered before signing: urn:concordia:predicate-type:unknown:v1

write_cases.name: predicate_type_alias_rejected_on_write

deferred_revocation._comment: DEFERRED in this PR: the revocation_records/now path depends on the unported concordia.cmpc module. JS asserts expected_verify_without today; expected_verify_with is the Python expectation the future cmpc-port PR must match (JS test is it.skip until then).
